chapterSummaries.1: Sincere faith, not ashamed of the gospel, guard the good deposit
chapterSummaries.2: Be strong in grace, endure hardship, approved workman, flee youthful lusts
chapterSummaries.3: Terrible times in the last days, all Scripture is God-breathed
chapterSummaries.4: Preach the word, Paul's final charge, the crown of righteousness
